text.title: Cloud Run Vpc Access Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cloud-run-vpc-access methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-mode
step.action: Decide connector (gen1) vs direct VPC egress (gen2).

step.name: provision
step.action: Create connector OR enable direct egress; size subnet `/28`.

step.name: validate-reachability
step.action: From service, hit private resource; confirm packet path via Flow Logs.
